description:
【Solid and Durable Grooming Table】The Pet Grooming Table is made of stainless steel frame, MDF board and PVC feet pad. Table Size: 46 x 23.8 x 29.3\' (LxWxH).Max. Weight Capacity:330 Lb.

【Folding Dog Grooming Table】Collapsible Dog Drying table for easy storage and space-saving when it is out of use.

【Height Adjustment Trimming Table】Height adjustable H-frame with two nooses for varied needs. The grooming table contains with 8 tension knobs for willingly arm height adjustment.

【Non-Slip Dog Drying Table】Thoughtful rounded table edges avoid undesired damage or injury. Anti-slip rubber in the feet adds stability and durability of the table.

【Extra Storage Space】The Bath Grooming Pet Table features with 1 lower rack for conveniently temporary storage.


Features:

Top High quality Non-slip pure rubber matting , scrap resistant and easy to clean.

Static-free board so hair and debris do not stick and can be easily cleaned and wiped down.

Waterproof 7-Layer sealed to stop damp entering the plywood top for a long trouble free use.

Deluxe aluminum edging.

featured design support brackets so will take the heaviest of dogs.

Steel reinforced rubber caps make the table ultra stable.

Heavy Duty Stainless steel Folding Legs,will not rust or corrode like chrome.

Folds for easy storage and can easily be carried so ideal for mobile groomers etc.

Will take the heaviest of dog with out a problem due to the design support

brackets and heavy duty folding leg.


Description:

Color: Black

Table Dimension: 46\'X 24\' X 0.8\' (L X W X Thickness)

Whole Unit Dimension: 46\'X 24\'X 64\'(L X W X H)

Size Of The Mesh Tray: 25.6\'X 12.6\'(L X W)

Material: Stainless Steel Frame And Anti-slip Rubber Table Surface

Length of Noose:20.5\'

Unit Weight: 39.7 Lbs

Weight Capacity: 250 Lbs


Package Includes:

1 X Grooming Table

2 X Adjustable Arm

1 X Adjustable Overhead Arm

2 X Noose

1 X Mesh Tray
